description: The ``From Unix Milliseconds`` node takes in the Unix milliseconds and then converts it into a DateTime, along with an option to offset it to make it a local DateTime (based on your time zone). The amount of milliseconds given will count up from the Unix epoch.

fields.UnixMilliseconds: The total Unix milliseconds for converting into a DateTime.
fields.* ([[Type:DateTime|DateTime]]): Returns the DateTime from the Unix milliseconds.
